name: NyxQueen 4Wave Diode Laser (Crystal Frost)
shortDescription: The NyxQueen diode laser in exclusive crystal frost (silver) finish. 600W power, 4 wavelengths, 50 million shot lifespan. The same cutting-edge technology with a modern silver appearance.
description: The NyxQueen diode laser crystal frost edition – the same professional-grade 600W power and 4-wavelength system in a modern silver finish. A perfect choice for those looking for a device that matches a clean, modern salon design.
metaTitle: NyxQueen Diode Laser Crystal Frost | 600W, 4 wavelengths, 50M shots
metaDescription: NyxQueen 600W diode laser in crystal frost (silver) finish. 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm), 50M shots, advanced cooling. 2-year warranty.
